news.t: Cisco's AI Efforts Magnify These ETFs

overview.description: The Direxion Daily CSCO Bear 1X ETF (CSCS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund provides inverse (-1x) exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of Cisco Systems, Inc (CSCO). CSCS was launched on Jun 25, 2025 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Cisco's AI Efforts Magnify These ETFs
data.text: Shares of Cisco Systems (CSCO) rallied Thursday after the networking gear maker delivered April-quarter results that beat Wall Street estimates. More importantly, the technology company boosted its 20...
